case_title: MCKNIGHT, LYDIA KAYE vs. RODRIGUEZ, JORGE et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCKNIGHT, LYDIA KAYE AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JORGE DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          FEB-09-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-11-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JAN-22-1996

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-09-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON FEB-09-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), OSC TO PLAINTIFF AS TO WHY NO PROOF OF SERVICE AND STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED. ( PLTF'S COUNSEL, MR. GOLD ARRIVED AFTER THE HEARING AND WAS ABLE TO TALK TO JUDGE WICK). HEARING SET FOR MAR-11-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-11-1996, CONTINUED TO APR-30-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PER COURT ORDER. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF APR-30-1996, CONTINUED TO MAY-29-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCKNIGHT, LYDIA KAYE
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCKNIGHT, LYDIA KAYE SERVED MAY-05-1996, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JORGE
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCKNIGHT, LYDIA KAYE
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-27-1996, OFF CALENDAR
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER & ORDER EXTENDING TIME FOR FILING PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCKNIGHT, LYDIA KAYE

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-29-1996, CONTINUED TO JUN-27-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ANSWER OR ENTRY OF DEFAULT OR FOR UNINSURED MOTORIST STATUS REPORT. IF NO ANSWER OR ENTRY OF DEFAULT IS FILED PLAINTIFF IS TO FILE A DECLARATION DESCRIBING PROSECUTION OF UNINSURED MOTORIST CLAIM TO DATE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
